digest.en: Israel and Hezbollah exchanged strikes in Lebanon. Iran's talks with the US remain on hold. Israeli Prime Minister said Hezbollah is dismantling the ceasefire with Lebanon.
digest.hi: होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य में आर्थिक युद्ध की स्थिति बनी हुई है। ईरान के विदेश मंत्री 24 घंटे के अंदर दोबारा इस्लामाबाद पहुंचे हैं। अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने कहा है कि युद्ध जल्द खत्म होगा।

articles.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes in Lebanon, as Iran Talks Remain on Hold
articles.summary: Israel and Hezbollah exchanged strikes in Lebanon as US-Iran talks stalled. Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.

articles.title: White House correspondents' dinner shooting LIVE: Shooting suspect wrote anti-Christian manifesto
articles.summary: A gunman tried to storm the White House Correspondents' dinner with guns and knives, leaving writings that targeted Trump administration officials, according to US President Donald Trump. The accused gunman who tried to storm the ballroom at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner with guns and knives left writings that called for the targeting of Trump administration officials, U. S.

articles.title: Iran and U.S. Sink Into Awkward Limbo of ‘No War, No Peace’
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi continued diplomatic efforts over the weekend, but US President Donald Trump scrapped a visit to Pakistan by his envoys, casting doubt on US-Iran peace hopes. The stalemate risks escalating tensions without a deal.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'We have all the cards', Trump says Iran can 'call
articles.summary: Iran shared a framework to end the war with Pakistan as the US holds back its envoy. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Iran shares 'workable framework' with Pak on ending war as US holds back envoy for talks The Times of India.

articles.title: Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U.S. envoys' trip canceled
articles.summary: Iran's foreign minister returned to Pakistan after a US envoy trip was canceled. Live Updates: Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U. S. envoys' trip canceled CBS News.

articles.title: Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi meets Army Chief Munir after returning to Pakistan
articles.summary: Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi met Pakistan's Army Chief Munir after returning to the country. Two Pakistani officials did not say when the Americans might return to the region to follow up on historic face-to-face talks earlier this month.

articles.title: 10 Minutes Before Firing At Trump Event, Shooter Sent A Manifesto To Family
articles.summary: The Trump event shooter sent a manifesto to family 10 minutes before firing, prompting his brother to raise the alarm. It was Allen's brother who first raised the alarm. 10 Minutes Before Firing At Trump Event, Shooter Sent A Manifesto To Family.

articles.title: Israel PM says Hezbollah 'dismantling' ceasefire with Lebanon
articles.summary: Israel's Prime Minister claims Hezbollah is dismantling the ceasefire with Lebanon, citing Israel's right to respond to planned attacks under the terms of the extended truce. Israel has been striking targets in south Lebanon almost daily.

articles.title: Iran shifts economic focus to essentials during war uncertainty
articles.summary: Iran is reversing a currency decision for basic items and using its sovereign fund amid war uncertainty. The government is partly reversing a currency decision for basic items and tapping into the country's sovereign fund.

articles.title: Trump says Iran can call if it wants to talk, as Iranian envoy returns to Pakistan
articles.summary: US President Trump said Iran can call to talk after cancelling planned negotiations. The US President said Iran "can come to us, or they can call us," after calling off planned negotiations in Islamabad this weekend.

articles.title: Abbas loyalists sweep Palestinian elections, including some seats in Gaza
articles.summary: Palestinian elections saw Abbas loyalists sweep to victory, including some seats in Gaza, despite low voter turnout due to the ongoing impact of the genocide. Voter turnout in Gaza remained low due to the ongoing impact of the genocide.

articles.title: Zelenskyy accuses Russia of 'nuclear terrorism' on Chernobyl anniversary
articles.summary: Ukraine's President Zelenskyy accused Russia of nuclear terrorism on the Chernobyl anniversary, following a barrage of over 100 drones launched by Moscow overnight, killing five people across Ukraine.

articles.title: Amid Iran's Attacks, UAE Called For Help. Israel Responded With Iron Dome
articles.summary: The UAE requested help after Iran's attacks, prompting Israel to deploy its Iron Dome system, which intercepted a barrage of 550 ballistic and cruise missiles and over 2,200 drones. Iran struck the UAE with 550 ballistic and cruise missiles, and over 2,200 drones.

articles.title: FIFA set to increase 2026 World Cup prize money
articles.summary: FIFA will increase 2026 World Cup prize money. FIFA set to increase 2026 World Cup prize money.

articles.title: Chelsea reach FA Cup final with 1-0 win over Leeds
articles.summary: Chelsea reached the FA Cup final with a 1-0 win over Leeds. Chelsea reach FA Cup final with 1-0 win over Leeds.

articles.title: Italy referee chief suspends himself over sports fraud investigation
articles.summary: Italy's referee chief suspended himself due to a sports fraud investigation. Italy referee chief suspends himself over sports fraud investigation.

articles.title: What to Know About King Charles and Queen Camilla’s U.S. State Visit Hosted by Trump
articles.summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla will visit the US, hosted by Trump. The British royals are set to arrive on Monday for a visit hosted by President Trump, with a garden party, an address to Congress and a banquet on the schedule.

articles.title: Notes from Central Taiwan: As Trump-Xi nears, once again, the sell out
articles.summary: Trump and Xi are nearing a meeting, sparking concerns in Taiwan. Notes from Central Taiwan: As Trump-Xi nears, once again, the sell out Taipei Times.

articles.title: New footage shows moment of deadly bus bombing in Colombia
articles.summary: New dashcam video shows a bomb-laden bus exploding in Colombia. Newly released dashcam video shows the moment that a bomb-laden bus exploded in Colombia. New footage shows moment of deadly bus bombing in Colombia.

articles.title: Why Israel has escalated attacks in Gaza
articles.summary: Israel escalated attacks in Gaza, expanding control in the strip. Israel escalates attacks and expands control in Gaza Strip, sidelining the new US-backed technocratic administration. Why Israel has escalated attacks in Gaza.

articles.title: Crushed at the Polls, Hungary’s Former Ruling Party Licks Its Wounds
articles.summary: Viktor Orban, co-founder of Hungary's Fidesz party, announced he will leave his Parliament seat but remain party head, as Fidesz suffered a crushing defeat in recent polls. Orban's decision comes as the party assesses its losses and looks to regroup.

articles.title: होर्मुज बना आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा

articles.title: ट्रंप बोले- ईरानी अधिकारी फोन पर कर सकते हैं बात; फिर नाटो पर भड़के अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने कहा कि ईरानी अधिकारी फोन पर बात कर सकते हैं। इसके बाद उन्होंने नाटो पर टिप्पणी की और कहा कि यह संगठन पुराना हो गया है। ट्रंप की टिप्पणियों से अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव कम होने की संभावना है।

articles.title: अमेरिका-ईरान के बीच शांति की उम्मीदें बरकरार, इस रिपोर्ट में बड़ा दावा

articles.summary: अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध के कारण दुनिया में 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं। इससे वैश्विक अर्थव्यवस्था और लोगों के जीवन पर नकारात्मक प्रभाव पड़ सकता है। गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह AajTak।
